description: Dispatch-bound conversion verification (corrects AST verifier defects 1-6): inspect the LIVE composed conversion mapping the loader dispatch actually returns for qwen3_5_moe_text, with exact patterns/dims/counts/multiplicity, instead of parsing arbitrary dict literals. Aggregate-only; source/runtime inspection, no weights.

dispatch_bound_verification.accessor: transformers.conversion_mapping.get_checkpoint_conversion_mapping('qwen3_5_moe_text') -> the final composed dispatch object (overwrite-immune, model_type-bound)
verified_exact: exactly one gate_up converter: target ['mlp.experts.gate_up_proj'], source exact ['mlp.experts.*.gate_proj.weight','mlp.experts.*.up_proj.weight'], ops exact [MergeModulelist(dim=0), Concatenate(dim=1)]
exactly one down converter: target ['mlp.experts.down_proj'], source exact ['mlp.experts.*.down_proj.weight'], ops exact [MergeModulelist(dim=0)]
no extra converter targeting the packed expert tensors (multiplicity == 2)
dispatch_bound_verification.defects_addressed: AST defects 1 (dispatch binding), 2 (same object), 3 (constructor dims), 4 (exact source-pattern equality), 5 (exact multiplicity), 6 (overwrite-immune via final object)

remaining_blockers.source_pin_independence: expected source digests must be derived from an independent upstream artifact (wheel/sdist/commit/blob), not the installed bytes; the installed transformers build's upstream reference must be resolved before the digest binding is non-self-bound
remaining_blockers.unified_production_composition: compose package-version + module-path + import-origin + loader-entry-point + dispatch + source-digest + dispatch-conversion into ONE committed production path with the full adversarial integration suite (including self-bound-identity and wrong-import-origin fails)
remaining_blockers.gptq_runtime_tuple: freeze + install Optimum / GPTQModel+Defuser (BACKEND.GPTQ_TORCH) for the differentiable activation-autograd fixture -- a runtime-tuple/install decision flagged for the operator
remaining_blockers.then: Phase-0 conjunction; weights; authorized GPU transition; exact forward + activation VJP/JVP parity; lens fit

privacy: aggregate-only; conversion-op labels + booleans + public library version, no host/private digests, tensor values, weights, caches, or local paths
